title: DPF Exhaust Gas Pressure Sensor for Kia Ceed/Rio, for Hyundai Santa FE/Tucson Exhaust Gas Differential Pressure Sensor Replaces 39251-2A600 39251-2A610 39210-2F600 39360-03HC0
features: 【Fitment】The exhaust gas pressure sensor is compatible for Hyundai Santa FE for Hyundai Tucson; Compatible for Kia Ceed for Kia Rio

【Function】The exhaust pressure sensor can keenly capture the engine speed. This change is transmitted to the engine control unit (ECU) through the sensor. The ECU adjusts the injection amount and ignition timing angle based on these signals to ensure that the engine can run stably and perform at its best under various working conditions
【Durable and Reliable】Our Exhaust Pressure Sensor is made of high quality plastic material, wear-resistant and durable, not easy to be damaged and deformed, long service life

【Cost-Effective and Simple Installation】No modifications and complicated steps, easy to install. If you are not familiar with exhaust pressure sensor maintenance or installation, it is recommended that you seek the assistance of a qualified technician or automotive expert
